doc.field: Collection processed by Finding aid prepared by Alta Macadam

HA at a reception at the British Institute to mark the publication of "The Soul's Gymnasium", 18 March, presented by Giuliano Pellegrini. Those present include: David Rundle, Kirsten Piacenti, Emanuela (Issi) Ricasoli (Lovatelli), Merritt Cootes, Titina Sartori, Mark Roberts, Jelka Resetar, Margaret Lowe, Judith Goldblatt, Magdalen Nabb,[Gianni Conti], Signora Traballesi, George d'Almeida, Mario Nepi, Gian Carlo Lazzeri, Giuliana Artom Treves, and Drusilla Gucci.

Series I: The Actons >> Subseries C: Acton, Harold (HA) >> 14 HA at formal ceremonies >> HA at a reception at the British Institute to mark the publication of "The Soul's Gymnasium", 18 March, presented by Giuliano Pellegrini. Those present include: David Rundle, Kirsten Piacenti, Emanuela (Issi) Ricasoli (Lovatelli), Merritt Cootes, Titina Sartori, Mark Roberts, Jelka Resetar, Margaret Lowe, Judith Goldblatt, Magdalen Nabb,[Gianni Conti], Signora Traballesi, George d'Almeida, Mario Nepi, Gian Carlo Lazzeri, Giuliana Artom Treves, and Drusilla Gucci.

HA at a reception at the British Institute to mark the publication of "The Soul's Gymnasium", 18 March, presented by Giuliano Pellegrini. Those present include: David Rundle, Kirsten Piacenti, Emanuela (Issi) Ricasoli (Lovatelli), Merritt Cootes, Titina Sartori, Mark Roberts, Jelka Resetar, Margaret Lowe, Judith Goldblatt, Magdalen Nabb,[Gianni Conti], Signora Traballesi, George d'Almeida, Mario Nepi, Gian Carlo Lazzeri, Giuliana Artom Treves, and Drusilla Gucci.

HA at a reception at the British Institute to mark the publication of "The Soul's Gymnasium", 18 March, presented by Giuliano Pellegrini. Those present include: David Rundle, Kirsten Piacenti, Emanuela (Issi) Ricasoli (Lovatelli), Merritt Cootes, Titina Sartori, Mark Roberts, Jelka Resetar, Margaret Lowe, Judith Goldblatt, Magdalen Nabb,[Gianni Conti], Signora Traballesi, George d'Almeida, Mario Nepi, Gian Carlo Lazzeri, Giuliana Artom Treves, and Drusilla Gucci.
